overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long BLSH Daily ETF (BLSG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Bullish (NYSE: BLSH) stock, less fees, and expenses. BLSH is a digital assets infrastructure platform that operates the institutional-focused Bullish Exchange and owns CoinDesk, offering trading, indices, data and media services for the crypto industry. BLSG was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
